overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic desert city with palm trees, construction cranes, and modern architecture. The clip transitions from sunny outdoor sidewalks through commercial streets and ends with an indoor conversation scene with NPCs.

asphalt road with moving vehicles and parked cars along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny urban sidewalk beside an orange residential building. The player walks forward along the concrete path, passing palm trees while construction cranes and unfinished skyscrapers dominate the distant skyline. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the street to the right.

The construction cranes shift to the right side of the frame as the camera moves along the wide concrete walkway, transitioning from the residential street to a more commercial district.

A futuristic sedan drives past on the right as the camera approaches storefronts, with a large pedestrian overpass structure visible ahead spanning the street.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk, the character passes a FASHION store with a prominent neon sign and approaches a yellow building with blue trim. A pedestrian walks ahead while another person sits against the building wall. The pedestrian bridge remains visible in the background to the right as the camera moves toward a building entrance.

segments.scene_description: The character enters the yellow building, transitioning from bright sunlight to a dimly lit interior room. Inside, a man in a silver jacket and a woman in a red dress stand conversing near a large metal door. The camera focuses on the NPCs as dialogue text appears on screen, indicating an interactive conversation scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched futuristic residential street into the dim interior of a commercial building. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside an orange building, moving past palm trees toward a skyline of construction cranes and unfinished skyscrapers. As the camera turns left, the residential atmosphere shifts into a wide, modern plaza featuring glass architecture and landscaped greenery before crossing an intersection where a futuristic sedan drives past. The scene then transitions into a commercial district, passing a neon-lit fashion store and a yellow building with blue trim while a pedestrian bridge looms in the background. Finally, the camera moves from the bright outdoor light through a building entrance into a dimly lit room, coming to a stop before a man in a silver jacket and a woman in a red dress engaged in conversation.
